explanation: I entered the seeded GitLab username after landing on the protected new-issue form.
I entered the seeded GitLab password.
I signed in so GitLab can redirect back to the new-issue form.
I entered the deterministic issue title for the cancel-flow check.

action.text: This issue draft should be canceled instead of being created.

explanation: I filled the issue description before canceling the draft.
I canceled the issue draft so GitLab returns to the project issues list without creating it.
